# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User prefers clean, consolidated UI layouts with specs integrated into quick-info sections rather than separate tabbed sections.
- Color consistency is important (#ef4444 red should be uniform across Category, Details, and Cart pages).
- Quick info items should have visual styling with left border, icon, and bold labels.
- Key specs (top 2) should appear in quick-info grid format, with full specs hidden by default.
